expectations.text: The decision resolves default `progress_file` to `dirname(prd_file) + "/progress.txt"` or the fixture `default-progress-path-fixture/progress.txt` path.
expectations.evidence:
The orchestrator must append or create progress on first write at evals/files/default-progress-path-fixture/progress.txt.
Forbidden fallback path families are session state, scratchpads, home directories, and ~/.copilot/....

expectations.text: The decision says the sibling path should be created on first append if it does not exist yet.
expectations.evidence:
The orchestrator must append or create progress on first write at evals/files/default-progress-path-fixture/progress.txt.
Forbidden fallback path families are session state, scratchpads, home directories, and ~/.copilot/....

expectations.text: The decision explicitly forbids session-state, scratchpad, temp-artifact, or `~/.copilot/...` fallback paths.
expectations.evidence:
The orchestrator must append or create progress on first write at evals/files/default-progress-path-fixture/progress.txt.
Forbidden fallback path families are session state, scratchpads, home directories, and ~/.copilot/....
